codeReview.summary: The ops/deployment/runtime review doc satisfies VAL-OPS-001. It documents Compose/runtime topology, profile boundaries, env and secret posture, app versus management health surfaces, observability hooks, blast radius, resilience/recovery assumptions, and the degraded 8081/9090/5433 probe story with concrete config, workflow, test, and passive runtime evidence.

summary: PASS. The ops/runtime review artifact is thorough, evidence-backed, and explicitly captures the required runtime-boundary, health-surface, observability, resilience, and degraded-environment analysis without scrutiny-level defects.
